Runners
Credentials
Meals
Transportation
Guest lists
Production office support
Typical roles:
This is often a separate hiring path from technical stagehand labor.

At large events, access control becomes a major operation. Typical work:
Wristbands
Credentials
Staff check-in
RFID systems
Scanner support
Gate troubleshooting
Guest list resolution
Zone access control
Lost/stolen credential issues
Typical roles:
This branch has grown because festivals now use more digital ticketing, wristband, scanning, and access-zone systems.
15. Security / Medical / Emergency Management
Usually handled by specialized contractors, but it shapes the whole site. Typical work:
Security posts
Bag checks
Pit security
Crowd management
Emergency lanes
Medical tents
Weather plans
Evacuation planning
Incident reporting
Radio communication
Typical roles:
Stagehands normally do not perform security or medical work, but they must understand how these departments affect site movement and emergency holds.
16. Sustainability / Waste / Environmental Operations

Recycling
Compost
Waste diversion
Water refill stations
Reusable cup systems
Generator reduction
Battery power pilots
Vendor sustainability compliance
Post-event site restoration
Carbon reporting
Typical roles:

Merch tents

Sponsor structures
Brand activations
Signage
Power drops
Load-in/load-out support
Guest-facing logistics
